meta.title: Aura — AI money management that budgets for you
meta.description: Aura connects your accounts, categorizes every transaction with AI, and builds a budget that adapts to your life. Join the early-access waitlist.

waitlist.successDesc: We’ll email you the moment your early access is ready.
waitlist.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Your money, finally on
hero.subtitle: Aura links your accounts, sorts every expense with AI, and builds a budget that adjusts as life happens — so you always know exactly where you stand.
hero.trust: Join 12,000+ people on the waitlist · No credit card needed

mockup.insight: You’re spending 18% less on dining than last month. Nice work!

features.title: Everything you need to feel in control
features.subtitle: Aura handles the tedious parts of money management so you can make better decisions, faster.

items.title: AI auto-categorization
items.desc: Every transaction is labeled the moment it lands — no spreadsheets, no manual tagging.

items.title: Budgets that adapt
items.desc: Aura learns your habits and adjusts your budget as your income and spending change.

items.title: Spending insights
items.desc: Clear, friendly breakdowns show where your money goes and where you can trim.

items.title: Smart alerts
items.desc: Get a heads-up before you overspend, when bills are due, or when something looks off.

items.title: Goals on autopilot
items.desc: Set a goal and Aura moves money toward it automatically, a little at a time.

items.title: Bank-grade security
items.desc: 256-bit encryption and read-only connections. Your data is never sold.

how.title: Set up in under three minutes
how.subtitle: No finance degree required.

steps.title: Connect your accounts
steps.desc: Securely link your banks and cards in a few taps. Aura stays read-only.

steps.title: Let the AI do the sorting
steps.desc: Transactions are categorized and a starter budget is built for you instantly.

steps.title: Watch your money work
steps.desc: Track progress, hit your goals, and get gentle nudges that keep you on plan.

testimonials.title: Loved by early testers
testimonials.subtitle: Real reactions from our private beta.

items.quote: I finally stopped guessing where my paycheck went. Aura just shows me.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: The auto-budget caught two subscriptions I’d completely forgotten about.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: It feels less like budgeting and more like having a tiny finance team.
items.name: Priya S.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, free to start
pricing.subtitle: Join the waitlist now — early members get Plus free for their first year.

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.desc: For people serious about their goals.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything else you might be wondering.

items.a: Yes. Aura uses 256-bit encryption and read-only connections through trusted banking partners. We never sell your data, and we can’t move your money.
We’re onboarding waitlist members in batches throughout the beta. Join now to claim a spot near the front of the line.
Aura connects with thousands of banks and card issuers across major regions. If yours isn’t supported yet, you’ll be the first to know when it is.
There’s a free plan forever. Paid plans start at $8/mo — and waitlist members get Plus free for their first year.

items.q: Do I need to be good with money?
items.a: Not at all. Aura is built for people who’d rather not think about budgets. It does the work and explains everything in plain language.

cta.title: Take control of your money today
cta.subtitle: Join 12,000+ people getting early access to Aura. It’s free to start.

footer.tagline: AI-powered personal finance that budgets for you.
footer.disclaimer: Aura is a product concept. Figures shown are illustrative.
